description: The microsoft.dynamics365.finance.system connector provides access to Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance System entities via the OData REST API.
key-features: Manage system entities in Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance
Support for list, create, read, update, and delete operations
communication-scenario: Connecting to Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance System API
client-init: system:Client cl = check new ({auth: {tokenUrl, clientId, clientSecret}}, serviceUrl);
